displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) Vol. 8: Mutiny At Mon Cala
synopsis: Star Wars Volume 8: Mutiny At Mon Cala collects issues 44-49 in Marvel's Star Wars comic series. It takes place after the Battle of Yavin, and continues to follow the adventures of the Rebel Alliance. Featured are fan favorite characters, including Leia, Luke, and Wedge.
title: Star Wars (2015) Vol. 8: Mutiny At Mon Cala
